title: FINANCIAL SERVICES - 211info
text: APPRISEN FINANCIAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers comprehensive financial counseling services including: -Budget and debt management -Debt repayment strategies -HUD-approved mortgage, delinquency, and default resolution consolidation -Home purchase guidance -Bankruptcy counseling and post-bankruptcy counseling -Student loan counseling 700 Taylor Road Suite 150 Gahanna, OH 43230 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 5am-4pm, Friday 5am-3pm Email (888) 461-2927 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (888) 461-2927 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, call, email, or use the online chat feature for more information or questions FEES: Varies by service. Budget counseling, housing counseling, and student loan counseling are free. DOCUMENTS: Relevant financial documents, if available AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Bankruptcy Assistance Credit Counseling Debt Consolidation Services Homebuyer/Home Purchase Counseling HUD Approved Counseling Agencies Mortgage Delinquency and Default Counseling Personal Financial Counseling Predatory Lending Awareness Programs Reverse Mortgage Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. APPRISEN
